entities.name: BUFFALO MEAT
entities.description: Meat produced from buffaloes, the primary commodity of export in this study

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country of origin for the buffalo meat exports being analyzed

entities.name: EXPORT PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The evaluation of the success and trends of buffalo meat exports from India

entities.name: EXPORT COMPETITIVENESS
entities.description: The ability of India to compete effectively in the international buffalo meat market

entities.name: EXPORT GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in the volume or value of buffalo meat exports over time

entities.name: LIBERALIZATION POLICIES
entities.description: Government policies aimed at reducing trade restrictions to promote export growth

entities.name: DOMESTIC PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total amount of buffalo meat produced within India

entities.name: GDP
entities.description: Gross Domestic Product, used as an economic indicator for importing and exporting countries

entities.name: DISTANCE
entities.description: The geographical distance between India and the destination countries

entities.name: TRADE POLICY INDEX
entities.description: A metric used to assess the trade policies of the destination countries
